title: Foksi Bum Beginning
description: Adds dweller spirit mob that chases the player and drops powerful items if you could defeat him
body:
Adds dweller spirit mob that chases the player and drops powerful items if you could defeat him

 

This mod was made as commission and allowed to be posted in public

 

This mod requires Curios mod for working

 

Subscribe on mod's platforms:

Discord Server

YouTube

Telegram channel

Wiki

VK (Russian) 

 

 

Foksibum Mob:
- Have 650 health points
- 3 attack damage
- Adds Slowness and Bleeding effect on attack
- Drops Foksibum Mask, Fox Heart, Fox Axe, Fox Armor, 3 Diamonds, 3 Emeralds, 3 Iron Ingots, 3 Golden Ingots and 3 Lapis Lazuli 

 

Foksibum Mask:
- Mask that looks like Foksibum mob's head
- Adds Night Vision effect
- Can be crafted into Foksibum Head block that can be placed and also crafted back
- Can be trimmed with Armor Templates

 

Fox Armor:
- Have characteristics between Diamond and Netherite Armors
- Can be trimmed with Armor Templates

 

Fox Axe: 
- Have 40 attack damage
- Adds Bleeding effect on attack 
- "/gamerule foxAxeDrop false" command could turn off this axe to drop

 

Bleeding effect:
- New effect that deals additional damage equal to effect's level while attacked. Foksibum and Fox Axe increases Bleeding effect

 

Fox Heart: 
- New item that could be crafted into Fox Charm

 

Fox Charm:

- New charm that shoul be put into Curios slot
- Adds Regeneration, Strength, Fire Resistance and Water Breathing effects

 


Foksibum Book:
- It given at the first time while player enters the world

 

Tough Defeat Win The Fox:
- Advancement for defeating the Foksibum
